raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A red apple and a brown circular object are on a wooden table. The red apple is a smooth, round fruit with a glossy surface. The brown object is a small, flat disc. STRATEGY - Reach for the apple, grasp it securely, transport it to a destination (e.g., a container), and place it there. Failure modes include dropping the apple during transport or misplacing it. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the apple body for initial contact; Step 2 grasp the apple body for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the destination; Step 4 place on the destination surface.
Goal: on(apple, container); stable(apple)
Scene: red_apple, brown_disc, table
Step 1: reach(red_apple)
  affordance_region: the body of the red apple
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_apple, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_apple) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_apple)
  affordance_region: the body of the red apple
  contact: holding(red_apple) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_apple)
Step 3: transport(red_apple -> container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the container
  spatial: above(red_apple, container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_apple)
  done_when: above(red_apple, container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_apple -> container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the container
  contact: surface_contact(red_apple, container) [completion]; released(red_apple) [completion]
  pose: stable(apple) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_apple, container) AND released(red_apple)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red apple
the body of the red apple
an empty area inside the container
an empty area inside the container
